answers: Identify strengths, build skills, network, keep resume updated, practice interviews!
Career advice: identify what you're good at and what you enjoy, build relevant skills, grow your network, and keep applying consistently.
To land a job: tailor your resume for each role, practise common interview questions, connect with people on LinkedIn, and follow up after applications.
Career tip: skills + network + visibility. Build your skills, share your work online, and reach out to people in your target industry.
